# Client Photos Directory

This directory contains client photos for the testimonials section.

## Required Photos:

1. **michael-tesfaye.jpg** - Photo of Michael Tesfaye (CEO, Tech Solutions Ethiopia)
2. **sarah-bekele.jpg** - Photo of Sarah Bekele (Homeowner, Bole)
3. **daniel-haile.jpg** - Photo of Daniel Haile (Restaurant Owner, Kazanchis)

## Photo Requirements:

- **Format**: JPG or PNG
- **Size**: 200x200 pixels minimum (square aspect ratio recommended)
- **Quality**: High resolution for crisp display
- **Style**: Professional headshots or casual photos work well
- **Background**: Clean, uncluttered backgrounds preferred

## How to Add Photos:

1. Save your client photos in this directory
2. Name them exactly as listed above
3. The website will automatically display the photos
4. If a photo is missing, the system will fall back to emoji icons

## Fallback System:

If any photo fails to load, the system will automatically show the original emoji icon as a fallback, ensuring the testimonials always display properly.

## Privacy Note:

Make sure you have permission from clients to use their photos on your website before adding them here.
